transcript.clean_text: the final day of pachinis rarely disappoints and the 2022 edition was certainly no different 115 kilometers five climbs heading out by the var river and heading up into the arepay of nice the hills behind the city in the southeast of france the race would finish with one ascent of coldes and its famous descent back into town and a finish on the pond this only only 89 riders left in the race at the start and it was soon whittled down to an elite group at the front no breakaway allowed to go but there were mechanical problems of plenty with the rain and the weather conditions also affecting things pierlator suffered a mechanical he would have failed to regain contact with the front of the group and omar friele with 50 kilometers to go set up danny martinez for an attack as primo's roglich and company were forced to respond roglic should lost steven carlsfake and rowan dennis martinez attacking quintana trying to go with him and suddenly primoz roglich only had watfornaut for company in terms of teammates simon yates followed well second in the gc at 47 seconds before the day quintan a little further back but looking for a stage when martinez in third place yates his teammate in fourth losing contact too over the penultimate climb of the day there would go and a top group of five riders already in the lead with 46 kilometers to go and a gap of 50 seconds onto the final sprint at la chobi and there'll be three bonus seconds for simon yates two going the way of danny martinez yates at 44 seconds from roglich's lead after that point then disaster for the colombian martinez a back wheel puncture a blowout on the descent and he will not see the front of the race again either there were nervous moments all the way under the foot of the coldest martinez would be at just under a minute back and on the race's signature climb six kilometers long seven point six percent quintana will be the first to try his luck seemingly in a little bit of trouble here but he'd grit his teeth quintana would be caught and then simon yates would go with 19 kilometers to the finish yates started rather quickly to pull out a good advantage 20 seconds came as much as 29 at some point remember with the 10 bonus seconds as well simon yates getting close to overturning the deficit roglic in trouble quintana dropped welfare did a great job though to keep the gap stable and just over 20 seconds when they began the descent back into the city two against one though was always going to produce a result favorable for yumbo visma that happened in terms of the general classification but simon yates absolutely superbly held on for what would be another fakinis stage win a fourth stage winning four different additions at fahinis and a second place for the second time in his career in the gc yates winning for the first time since last may at the gyrod italia and ending the week and second prima roglic striking a big blow to the rest of his rivals who might have been hoping that once again he was going to crumble on the final day of a french stage race simon yates with a huge victory and primoz roglich overcoming a big psychological barrier martinez would come home in the bunch behind and finish third on the gc yet second just under half a minute the difference as primoz roglic would hold on so yet winning by nine seconds from fanart and roglich mcnulty bringing home the rest at a minute and 44. the most valuable of teammates and a first world tour stage race win on french soil for primoz roglich his 15th stage race win in his career one of the biggest in terms of what it might have meant with the possibility of another last day collapse 29 seconds his margin of victory yates and second martinez third roglich with a stage race win and victory in the race to the sun what bernard would end the week in the green jersey stage win for him along the way as well and a day in the yellow jersey as joao almeida took the white jersey vanilla madwes salvaged something after a poor week for group f deji that's something the king of the mountains jersey so a big week in parinis ending on the promenade zongli for the first time in three seasons the race back at home and entertainment as always on that final day roglich and yates providing it rogwich taking yellow yates with the stage honors
